research.title: CitrixBleed To Infinity And Beyond (Citrix NetScaler Pre-Auth Memory Overread CVE-2026-8451)
research.summary: Well, well, well - once again, the cat has dragged us in and spat us out. Today, we find ourselves questioning the reality we sit within. Must it be so predictable, and why us? “But watchTowr, what do you mean?” Well, if you’re here, you likely fit into one.

vulns.title: Widget Factory Joomla Content Editor Improper Access Control Vulnerability
vulns.summary: Widget Factory Joomla Content Editor contains an improper access control vulnerability which could allow for upload and execution of PHP code via the creation of new editor profiles for unauthenticated users.

vulns.title: Linux kernel FUSE readdir cache out-of-bounds write (CVE-2026-31694): a malicious FUSE server overflows a.
vulns.summary: Linux kernel FUSE readdir cache out-of-bounds write (): a malicious FUSE server overflows a page-cache page by 24 bytes. PoC plus an unprivileged local-root exploit via /etc/passwd page-cache corruption. Run only inside a VM.
vulns.technicalSummary: Linux kernel FUSE readdir cache out-of-bounds write (): a malicious FUSE server overflows a page-cache page by 24 bytes. PoC plus an unprivileged local-root exploit via /etc/passwd page-cache corruption. Run only inside a VM.
vulns.breakdown: Linux kernel FUSE readdir cache out-of-bounds write (): a malicious FUSE server overflows a page-cache page by 24 bytes. PoC plus an unprivileged local-root exploit via /etc/passwd page-cache corruption. Run only inside a VM.
vulns.whatBroke: Linux kernel FUSE readdir cache out-of-bounds write (): a malicious FUSE server overflows a page-cache page by 24 bytes. PoC plus an unprivileged local-root exploit via /etc/passwd page-cache corruption. Run only inside a VM.

vulns.title: TP-Link Router OS Command Injection
vulns.summary: A command injection vulnerability was identified in TP-Link TL-WR802N v4, TL-WR841N v14, and TL-WR840N v6 due to improper neutralization of special elements used in an OS command. In the router configuration import function.

vulns.title: — Linux Kernel Futex PI Use-After-Free
vulns.summary: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: rtmutex: Use waiter::task instead of current in remove_waiter() remove_waiter() is used by the slowlock paths, but it is also used for proxy-lock rollback in.
